A very disappointing experience with Crumble. I placed an order and was told the delivery would take 45 minutes. After waiting, I called the helpline, and they said they would call me back in 5 minutes. When they did, they assured me that the order was out for delivery and would arrive shortly. However, 30 minutes later, the rider called asking for my location — and upon inquiry, I was told he had just received the order and was still at the branch. This level of dishonesty and misinformation is
